Subject: FERC Approval of the NYISO Virtual Bidding Proposal
Message:
This past Wednesday, FERC approved the NYISO's virtual bidding program, subject to a modification that reduces the required collateral for program participants by 50%. (Enron, among others, had expressed concern about the high level of required collateral in its comments.) As noted in the ISO's attached announcement, Virtual Bidding will commence on November 1.

-----Original Message-----
From: market_relations@nyiso.com [mailto:market_relations@nyiso.com]
